exercises.title: Memoize Fibonacci
exercises.description: Add caching to a recursive Fibonacci implementation and compare the call count before and after.
exercises.expected_outcome: Repeated subproblems should disappear and runtime should drop sharply.

exercises.title: Inspect a coin-change table
exercises.description: Print the DP table for minimum coin change on a small target and explain each transition.
exercises.expected_outcome: You should see the table fill from smaller amounts up to the target.

exercises.title: Solve 0/1 knapsack
exercises.description: Implement the classic 0/1 knapsack DP and test it with a small item set.
exercises.expected_outcome: The solver should maximize value without exceeding capacity.

exercises.title: Compute edit distance
exercises.description: Write a Levenshtein distance solver and verify the insert/delete/replace transitions.
exercises.expected_outcome: The final distance should match the minimum number of edits needed.

exercises.title: Build an interval DP
exercises.description: Solve a weighted interval scheduling or palindrome interval problem with a DP table.
exercises.expected_outcome: The solution should choose compatible intervals or subranges optimally.

exercises.title: Space-optimize a 2D DP
exercises.description: Take a 2D DP and reduce it to a rolling-row or one-dimensional implementation.
exercises.expected_outcome: The optimized version should use less memory while returning the same answer.
